mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_fav_music (user_id, music_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{musicId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.music_id AS musicId, m.track_name AS trackName, m.artist_name AS artistName, a.album_name AS albumName, a.album_cover_url AS albumCoverUrl FROM user_fav_music uf JOIN music_features m ON TRIM(uf.music_id) = TRIM(m.music_id) LEFT JOIN albums a ON m.album_id = a.album_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT AVG(m.popularity) AS avgPopularity, AVG(m.energy) AS avgEnergy, AVG(m.danceability) AS avgDanceability, AVG(m.happiness) AS avgHappiness, AVG(m.acousticness) AS avgAcousticness, AVG(m.instrumentalness) AS avgInstrumentalness, AVG(m.liveness) AS avgLiveness, AVG(m.speechiness) AS avgSpeechiness, STDDEV(m.popularity) AS stdPopularity, STDDEV(m.energy) AS stdEnergy, STDDEV(m.danceability) AS stdDanceability, STDDEV(m.happiness) AS stdHappiness, STDDEV(m.acousticness) AS stdAcousticness, STDDEV(m.instrumentalness) AS stdInstrumentalness, STDDEV(m.liveness) AS stdLiveness, STDDEV(m.speechiness) AS stdSpeechiness FROM user_fav_music uf JOIN music_features m ON uf.music_id = m.music_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId}
